message:
Command `grep -n "PREADY\|pready" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_GPIO/rtl/nc_gpio.v | head -10
echo "---"
grep -n "PREADY\|pready" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_UART/rtl/nc_uart.v | head -10
echo "---"
grep -n "PREADY\|pready" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_CRC/rtl/nc_crc_apb.v | head -10` executed with exit code 0.
content:
39:    output wire                     PREADY,     // APB Ready
567:assign PREADY  = 1'b1;   // Always ready (single-cycle response)
---
38:    output wire        PREADY,
1139:    assign PREADY  = ~tx_fifo_write_stall;  // Stall on TX FIFO full
---
34:    output wire        PREADY,
93:assign PREADY  = 1'b1;

extras.command:
grep -n "PREADY\|pready" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_GPIO/rtl/nc_gpio.v | head -10
echo "---"

echo "---"
grep -n "PREADY\|pready" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_CRC/rtl/nc_crc_apb.v | head -10
